summary: Implemented and pushed a task lifecycle / finish-gate integrity layer. Added current-vault and regression reports for active, stale-active, terminal, missing-trace, orphan-trace, partial-grounded, and ungrounded task finishes. Added task lifecycle outputs to status freshness and verify:goal. Current-vault report before closing this task detected 12 blockers: 11 stale active tasks and 1 terminal task missing trace, with 8 freshness artifacts fresh after index/audit refresh.
decisions: Task lifecycle current-vault command intentionally exits nonzero when stale active tasks, terminal missing traces, orphan traces, task-id mismatches, or ungrounded finishes remain.
Status freshness checks whether the task lifecycle artifact is current, but verify:goal checks whether the task lifecycle report is actually healthy.
Use trace_only for this finish to avoid auto-compounding more review backlog while implementing finish-gate integrity.
Do not mutate or auto-close old started tasks in this pass; classify them first so the next pass can close/repair with explicit reasons.
next_steps: Implement bounded stale active task cleanup: auto-close or archive old started tasks with explicit reason, owner, and recheck policy.
Repair the one terminal task missing a trace or classify it as historical/incomplete with a durable record.
Then implement real RAG eval beyond current context/path recall: answer correctness, faithfulness, source attribution, latency, and memory-on/off comparison.
Expose task lifecycle/finish gate status in Observatory Korean UI with browser/DOM proof.
search_queries: inspect task and trace schemas for finish_task lifecycle
implement task lifecycle finish gate report
wire task lifecycle into status freshness and verify:goal
